mapper.sql:
SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(REQ.SYS_RDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),0,8) AS sysRdate , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0025', REQ.TB_CD) AS tbCd , REQ.DLVRY_NO AS dlvrNo , REQ.RES_NO AS resNo , DLV.DLVRY_NAME AS dlvryName , DLV.DLVRY_ADDR AS dlvryAddr , DLV.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL AS dlvryAddrDtl , DLV.DLVRY_POST AS dlvryPost , DLV.DLVRY_MEMO AS dlvryMemo , DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN||'-'||DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN||'-'||DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS mobileNo , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9002', REQ.REQUEST_STATE_CODE) AS requestStateCode FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP REQ , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP DLV WHERE REQ.REQUEST_KEY = DLV.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.TB_CD IS NOT NULL AND REQ.DLVRY_NO IS NOT NULL AND REQ.SYS_RDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{frmStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'000000','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(#{frmEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'235959','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
AND DLV.DLVRY_NAME LIKE '%'||#{frmDlvryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
AND REQ.TB_CD = #{frmTbCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND REQ.DLVRY_NO = REPLACE(#{frmDlvrNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'-','')
AND REQ.RES_NO = #{frmResNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN||DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN||DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN LIKE '%'||#{frmMobileNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
ORDER BY REQ.SYS_RDATE DESC
mapper.select: /* ParcelServiceMapper.selectMsgCnt */ SELECT NVL( D.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN||D.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN||D.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN, C.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN||C.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN||C.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) AS TEL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A, MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP B, MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP C, MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP D WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'RCP9018' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.RES_NO = #{resNo} AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND B.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND A.CD_VAL = B.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID

/* ParcelServiceMapper.getResNo */ SELECT A.RES_NO , COUNT(1) OVER() AS CNT FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '10' AND A.DLVRY_NO = REPLACE(#{dlvrNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'-','') AND A.TB_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'RCP0025' AND B.CD_DSC = TRIM(#{tbCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND C.GRP_ID = 'LGS1006' AND INSTR(C.CD_VAL, 'Y') > 0 AND C.CD_DSC = TRIM(#{requestStateCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
/* ParcelServiceMapper.getTbCd */ SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0025' AND CD_DSC = TRIM(#{tbCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
